memory_entries.text: In jd/tenacity, retry decorator selection is in tenacity/__init__.py retry() around lines 698-730; BaseRetrying.wraps creates wrapper attributes; Retrying.__call__ executes sync functions; AsyncRetrying in tenacity/asyncio/__init__.py handles async coroutine functions.
